sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, event_date Date, event_time DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date, event_time) VALUES (1, toDate('1999-01-01'), toDateTime('1999-01-01 12:00:00'));
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = changeYear(event_date, 2020) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, changeYear(event_date, 2025) AS new_event_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, changeYear(event_time, 2023) AS updated_event_time FROM test_dates;
